description_long: This stuffed toy is modeled after a pink, cartoonish creature with a large, rounded body and a prominent, extended tongue. Its body is primarily pink with cream-colored accents on the belly and around the mouth area. The toy has short, stubby arms and legs, and a thick, curled tail extending from the back. The face features small, round black eyes and a simple, friendly expression. The surface appears soft and plush, suggesting a cuddly and squeezable texture. The overall design is whimsical and playful, making it appealing for children and collectors alike.
description: A pink, plush cartoon creature with a large extended tongue, round body, and cream accents, featuring a friendly face and curled tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, extended tongue, round face, and cream-colored belly details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the tongue, the rounded head, and the thick, curled tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curled tail and the back of the arms and legs, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tongue's extension and the profile of the body and tail.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with small, round black eyes and a simple, closed mouth. The extended tongue adds a playful and whimsical touch.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms outstretched to the sides, legs bent forward, and tongue extended straight outward.
